task:
# Relay stage 1: Ideate
Task: use-same-accordions-for-input-and-output-tabs
Working directory: /tmp/nix-shell.dd17Hs/visual-relay/wt/f68ff1f862b4/plan-20260627141824/use-same-accordions-for-input-and-output-tabs

## Task input
# Use Same Accordions for Input and Output Tabs

Render the Output tab's fields with the same accordion (Expander) component the Input tab already uses for its prompt sections, instead of the static bordered boxes it uses today. This both unifies the two tabs and fixes the Output defect where Text/List field values cannot be selected — the Input accordion already shows its body in a `SelectableTextBlock`, so adopting it makes Output selectable too.

## Current state (researched)

- `ActivityColumn.axaml` hosts a `TabControl`; the Input tab (index 3) is `<controls:StageInputView/>` and the Output tab (index 4) is `<controls:StageOutputView/>`.
- **Input (the preferred component)** — `StageInputView.axaml`, branch `<!-- Ready: parsed input sections in Expanders -->`: an `ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding StageDetail.InputSections}"` over `PromptSection`. Each item template is `Border` (`Margin="4"`, `#2A303A`, `BorderThickness="1"`, `CornerRadius="6"`) → `Expander Header="{Binding Title}" IsExpanded="{Binding CollapsedByDefault, Converter={x:Static cvt:BoolNotConverter.Instance}}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Padding="8,4"` → `Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*"` with a Copy `Button Click="CopyPromptSectionBody_Click"` and a `SelectableTextBlock Text="{Binding Body}"` (monospace).
- `StageInputView.axaml.cs` `CopyPromptSectionBody_Click`: `if (sender is Button { DataContext: PromptSection section } && TopLevel.GetTopLevel(this)?.Clipboard is { } clipboard) await clipboard.SetValueAsync(DataFormat.Text, section.Body);` wrapped in `try/catch` (usings `Avalonia.Input`, `Avalonia.Input.Platform`, `VisualRelay.App.Services`).
- **Output (to replace)** — `StageOutputView.axaml`, branch `<!-- Ready: rendered output fields -->`: an `ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding StageDetail.OutputFields}"` over `OutputField`. Each item is `Border Padding="12"` → `Grid` with `TextBlock Text="{Binding Label}"` then per-kind content gated by `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter`: Text → plain `TextBlock` (not selectable), List → nested `ItemsControl` over `Value` via `StringSplitConverter` (not selectable), Json → `SelectableTextBlock`. Only Json is selectable today. `StageOutputView.axaml.cs` is just a ctor.
- `OutputFieldParser.cs`: `public sealed record OutputField(string Label, OutputFieldKind Kind, string Value)` and `public enum OutputFieldKind { Text, List, Json }`. `Value` is a single display string for every kind — `MapArray` joins List items with `'\n'`, Json is pretty-printed — so `Value` can be rendered directly in one `SelectableTextBlock`.
- `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs` and `StringSplitConverter.cs` are referenced **only** in `StageOutputView.axaml` (grep-confirmed; not registered in `App.axaml`), so they become dead once the template is replaced and should be deleted. `BoolNotConverter` is shared with `StageInputView.axaml`/`SettingsPanel.axaml` — leave it. Keep the `OutputFieldKind` enum (still on the record and used by the parser/tests).
- Tests: `ActivityColumnTabsUiTests` is a `[Collection("Headless")]` partial using `[AvaloniaFact]`. Helpers in `ActivityColumnTabsUiTests.cs`: `AssertContainsText(root, expected)` (reads visible `TextBlock` + `SelectableTextBlock` text) and `SwitchToTabAndFindView<T>(activityColumn, tabIndex)`. `OutputTab_Ready_RendersFieldsByKind` and `OutputTab_Ready_ShowsRenderedFieldsWithoutTogglingRawJson` (`...StageRendering.cs`) assert text presence only and still pass after the change. `OutputTab_Ready_AllFieldBordersStretchToPanelWidth` / `OutputTab_Ready_LastFieldBottomIsInsideScrollExtent` (`...AccordionLayout.cs`) measure the outer item `Border` (`Margin="4"`) and still pass; their comment "Output items are Borders, not Expanders" goes stale. `BuildOutputViewModel()` there builds Text/List/Json fields.

## What to build (TDD first)

1. **Add a failing test** in `tests/VisualRelay.Tests/ActivityColumnTabsUiTests.StageRendering.cs` (or a new partial of the same class): `OutputTab_Ready_RendersFieldsAsExpandersWithSelectableBodies`, `[AvaloniaFact]`. Build a VM with three `OutputField`s — Text `"Created tests."`, List `"a.cs\nb.cs"`, Json `{"count": 3}` — `OutputState = StageDetailState.Ready`. `SwitchToTabAndFindView<StageOutputView>(activityColumn, 4)`, then assert: `GetVisualDescendants().OfType<Expander>()` yields exactly 3, all `IsExpanded` is true, and one has `Header?.ToString() == "summary"`; the visible `SelectableTextBlock`s include texts `"Created tests."`, `"a.cs\nb.cs"`, and `{"count": 3}`. This fails today (no Expanders; Text/List not selectable).
2. **Replace the OutputField item template** in `StageOutputView.axaml` to mirror the Input accordion exactly: `Border Margin="4"` (`#2A303A`, `BorderThickness="1"`, `CornerRadius="6"`, `HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"`) → `Expander Header="{Binding Label}" IsExpanded="True" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" HorizontalContentAlignment="Stretch" Padding="8,4"` → `Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*"` `RowSpacing="8"` with a Copy `Button Content="Copy" Click="CopyOutputFieldValue_Click"` and a `SelectableTextBlock Text="{Binding Value}"` (monospace, `FontSize="12"`, `LineHeight="18"`, `Foreground="#C8CED8"`, `TextWrapping="Wrap"`). Render `Value` directly for all kinds — drop the per-kind Text/List/Json branches and the `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter`/`StringSplitConverter` bindings.
3. **Add the copy handler** in `StageOutputView.axaml.cs`: `CopyOutputFieldValue_Click`, mirroring `CopyPromptSectionBody_Click` exactly but `sender is Button { DataContext: OutputField field }` → `clipboard.SetValueAsync(DataFormat.Text, field.Value)`, same `try/catch` guard. Add usings `Avalonia.Input`, `Avalonia.Input.Platform`, `VisualRelay.App.Services`.
4. **Delete the now-dead converters** `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs` and `StringSplitConverter.cs`.
5. **Update stale comments only**: in `...AccordionLayout.cs` change "Output items are Borders, not Expanders" to reflect that each output item is now a `Border` containing an `Expander`; in `...StageRendering.cs` update the `OutputTab_Ready_RendersFieldsByKind` doc comment ("renders fields by kind") to note unified accordion rendering. No assertion changes — they still pass.

Do not touch `StageInputView`, `ActivityColumn`, `StageDetailViewModel`, `OutputFieldParser`, the Raw JSON toggle, or the placeholder/transitional states. Do not introduce a shared Input/Output abstraction — `PromptSection` and `OutputField` differ and that is out of scope. Minimal diff; do not reformat unrelated code.

## Done when

- The Output tab's Ready view renders one `Expander` per `OutputField`, each `IsExpanded="True"`, header = `Label`, body = `SelectableTextBlock` bound to `Value`.
- Text, List, and Json field values are all selectable (verified by the new test).
- Each output accordion has a working Copy button that copies `field.Value` to the clipboard (mirrors the Input handler).
- `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs` and `StringSplitConverter.cs` are deleted; `BoolNotConverter` and the `OutputFieldKind` enum remain; the solution still compiles.
- Existing output tests pass unchanged; the two stale comments are corrected.
- `./visual-relay check` passes; changed C#/XAML files stay under 300 lines.
- Commit subject is Conventional Commit `fix: render output fields in accordions to match input tab` (lowercase after prefix, no trailing period, no em dash, ≤72 chars).

result.answer:
## Summary

The task is to replace the Output tab's static per-kind field rendering (TextBlock for Text, nested ItemsControl for List, SelectableTextBlock for Json — only Json is selectable) with the same accordion (Expander) pattern the Input tab already uses for its `PromptSection` items. This makes all output field values selectable (fixing the Text/List copy defect) and unifies the visual language between the two tabs. It also removes two now-dead converters and updates stale comments in tests.

### Five atomic steps (as prescribed)

| Step | File(s) | What |
|------|---------|------|
| 1 | `tests/.../ActivityColumnTabsUiTests.StageRendering.cs` | Add failing `[AvaloniaFact]` asserting 3 `Expander`s, `IsExpanded=true`, headers match labels, `SelectableTextBlock`s contain the values |
| 2 | `src/.../StageOutputView.axaml` | Replace the `DataTemplate` inside `<ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>` — drop the per-kind branches (`OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter`/`StringSplitConverter` bindings) and use `Border` → `Expander` (`Header="{Binding Label}"`, `IsExpanded="True"`) → `Grid` with Copy `Button` + `SelectableTextBlock` (monospace, `Text="{Binding Value}"`) — mirrors Input exactly |
| 3 | `src/.../StageOutputView.axaml.cs` | Add `CopyOutputFieldValue_Click` handler (same `try/catch`/clipboard pattern as Input's `CopyPromptSectionBody_Click`) |
| 4 | `src/.../OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs`, `src/.../StringSplitConverter.cs` | Delete both (they become dead code; `BoolNotConverter` and `OutputFieldKind` enum stay) |
| 5 | `tests/.../ActivityColumnTabsUiTests.AccordionLayout.cs`, `tests/.../ActivityColumnTabsUiTests.StageRendering.cs` | Update two stale doc comments only — no assertion changes |

### Constraints

- No changes to `StageInputView`, `ActivityColumn`, `StageDetailViewModel`, `OutputFieldParser`, the Raw JSON toggle, or placeholder/transitional states
- No shared Input/Output abstraction
- Files must stay under 300 lines
- Existing tests must pass unchanged

---

## Solution Options

```json
{
  "summary": "Replace the Output tab's static per-kind field boxes (TextBlock/ItemsControl/SelectableTextBlock gated by converters) with the same Border→Expander→Grid(CopyButton+SelectableTextBlock) accordion pattern the Input tab uses, making all field values selectable and removing two now-dead converters.",
  "options": [
    "Option A — Direct Input mirror (prescribed). Copy the Input tab's DataTemplate structure verbatim: `Border Margin=\"4\" BorderBrush=\"#2A303A\" BorderThickness=\"1\" CornerRadius=\"6\"` → `Expander Header=\"{Binding Label}\" IsExpanded=\"True\"` → `Grid RowDefinitions=\"Auto,*\"` with Copy button (`Click=\"CopyOutputFieldValue_Click\"`) + `SelectableTextBlock Text=\"{Binding Value}\"` (monospace `FontSize=\"12\"` `LineHeight=\"18\"` `Foreground=\"#C8CED8\"` `TextWrapping=\"Wrap\"`). Drop the per-kind branches entirely — `Value` already holds the final display string for all three kinds. Delete `OutputFieldKindEqualsConverter.cs` and `StringSplitConverter.cs`. Add the clipboard-copy code-behind. Simplest diff, most faithful to the task spec.",
    "Option B — Keep converters but wrap in Expander. Instead of removing per-kind branches, wrap the existing `Grid` content inside an `Expander` and convert the `TextBlock` (Text kind) and `ItemsControl` (List kind) to `SelectableTextBlock` to fix selectability. Avoids deleting files. However, this leaves dead converter references (the converters are only used here, so they become unused imports) and doesn't match the Input's cleaner unified template. Higher maintenance surface; not recommended.",
    "Option C — Extract a shared resource `ExpanderItemStyle`. Define a reusable `Border+Expander+CopyButton+SelectableTextBlock` template as an `Application` or `ContentControl` resource and reference it from both `StageInputView` and `StageOutputView`. This DRY-est option but the task explicitly forbids introducing a shared Input/Output abstraction (\"out of scope\"), so it would violate the minimal-diff constraint."
  ]
}
```
